name: Client Operating Model Phase 3 MDM Source Authority
outcome_goal: Produce the MDM identity, normalization, lineage, and source authority implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not create hand-authored field precedence sprawl.
Do not let LLM judgment replace deterministic evidence.

jobs.label: phase_03_mdm_source_authority_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_03_mdm_source_authority/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 3: MDM Identity, Normalization, Lineage, and Source Authority. Include identity clusters, reversible links, normalization rules, hierarchy/flattening signals, field comparison, freshness scoring, source authority evidence, typed gaps, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
